ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock entry */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code (ticker symbol) */,
  "rank1" REAL /* Rank 1 performance metric */,
  "rank2" REAL /* Rank 2 performance metric */,
  "rank3" REAL /* Rank 3 performance metric */,
  "rank4" REAL /* Rank 4 performance metric */,
  "rank5" REAL /* Rank 5 performance metric */,
  "decision" INTEGER /* Final decision (0: hold, 1: buy, 2: sell) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the stock belongs to */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the stock on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Revenue growth percentage */,
  "net_income_growth" REAL /* Net income growth percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the performance metric in the overall decision-making process */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula or method used to calculate the performance metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_metrics" (
  "stock_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock metric entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric for the stock */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow Statement) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "ebit" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest and Taxes (EBIT) of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "free_cash_flow" REAL /* Free cash flow of the company for the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., performance, news, event) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., unread, read, dismissed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
